productDisplayName: Puma Men Java Black Flip Flops
description: Whether you're heading to the pool, beach or just a chilled-out evening, these Java flip flops from puma are a great and practical addition to your casual footwear. Slip into these soft and comfortable flip flops after a long day's work and make your feet feel like they are in heaven!UpperSuper soft textile straps for ease of wear and durabilityToe separator for enhanced grip and comfortSoft and padded EVA footbed with puma logo for enhanced comfort and styleOutsoleRubber outsole with a textured dotted pattern and Puma logo embossed on the heel for maximum grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
